description: Short-routes subset of og-zeppelin.json for fast bake-sweep iteration. Skips the 132s ClimbOrgrimmarTowerToFrezza long route. Use the full manifest for end-to-end validation.

routes.name: OgApproachToBoardingPosition
routes.description: PROOF C short-hop. Same-tile traversal from ApproachPosition to BoardingPosition. Detour returns 11 polys; first-failure is the deck-lip 1.75y step.

routes.name: OgFrezzaToBoardingPosition
routes.description: Short-hop control. Should remain clean Walk across all sweeps -- a regression here means the variant broke same-deck traversal.

routes.name: DeckLipStallToFrezza
routes.description: Phase 5.3.6 corner diagnostic. Stall coord -> Frezza spawn. The [001]->[002] segment is the canonical 1.75y deck-lip step-up.
